race.comment: YES YES BOSS (7) broke a run of outs with a tough win last start in a similar race to this at Tamworth. Has a wide gate to contend with but can press forward and find a spot in the leading division. Big chance to repeat the dose. DUBALENE (4) came from last to convincingly defeat eight runners in a comparable race here recently when fresh from a spell. Draws a good gate and with added fitness is a great chance to make it two on the trot. TRYANZA (2) has been mixing his form. Placed at four of his six runs over today's distance and jumps from an ideal gate so he must go in the numbers. CRITICAL TIME (1) boasts a fine first-up record so despite 61kgs he should be highly competitive.
